title: astragalus sesameus
intro: Astragalus sesameus, also known as milk vetch or Chinese milk vetch, is a flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and improve circulation. The health benefits of Astragalus sesameus include reduced stress and fatigue, improved respiratory health, and enhanced cardiovascular well-being. Astragalus sesameus is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
